title: The Enemy’s Trick Is Exposed
description: On pages 17–19, this part focuses on the enemy’s trick is exposed, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Enemy’s Trick Is Exposed. Nami begins turning Usopp’s flawed invention into a weapon suited to her intelligence and weather sense. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What're you looking at so intently?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You shouldn't be looking somewhere else until the fight's over...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Aren't you taking a life or death battle a little too lightly?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I used the cool balls to change the air density. Light will refract considerably when moving from across a layer of cold air to hot air.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Looks like this is the perfect weapon for me!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I now under- stand the China- tact!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You better give up while you can!

summary: This part develops the enemy’s trick is exposed and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
